name: evision-platform
description: Monorepo dev: Nest watch + Next HMR + Expo Fast Refresh

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,expo -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-web" "npm run dev --prefix mobile-app"
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-web"
